headline: C4 Therapeutics Maps Accelerated Approval Path for Myeloma Drug Cemsidomide at TD Cowen Conference
summary: C4 Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CCCC) used a presentation at TD Cowen’s 46th Annual Healthcare Conference to outline its near- and mid-term clinical plans, emphasizing its lead multiple myeloma program cemsidomide and a development strategy aimed at potential accelerated approval pathways.
